title: potentilla tormentilla-elatior
intro: Potentilla tormentilla-elatior is a perennial plant species in the family Rosaceae, commonly known as Tormentil or Celto. Native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Western Asia, it has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's rhizome is particularly valued for its medicinal properties, which include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Potentilla tormentilla-elatior can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, arthritis, and other inflammatory conditions.
